inline_comments.message:
in theory the properties owner should have the same id of the component if it is a property from the component, as per org.openecomp.sdc.be.components.property.DefaultPropertyDeclarator#resolvePropertiesOwner.

Have you checked why the id is not as expected?

"in theory the properties owner should have the same id of the component if it is a property from the component, as per..."

100% correct, but for propertiesOwner for Instance is Instance's ID
see https://jira.onap.org/secure/attachment/18216/Screenshot%20from%202022-07-07%2015-03-13.png
